title: taraxacum subaurosulum
intro: Taraxacum subaurosulum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a subspecies of the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum subaurosulum include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its ability to reduce symptoms of eczema and other skin conditions. Taraxacum subaurosulum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and digestive health.
